title: Missing luggage
explanation:
Missing luggage

Listen to a passenger reporting a problem at the airport.

Transcript

Passenger: Excuse me, my suitcase did not arrive on the belt.
Agent: I am sorry to hear that. Can I see your baggage tag?
Passenger: Yes, here it is. It is a large black case with a red ribbon.
Agent: We will track it and contact you as soon as possible.

questions.feedback: It is a large black case.

questions.text: It has a [*red ribbon|yellow sticker|green strap].
The agent says they will [*track it|replace it immediately|call the police].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The suitcase did not arrive on the ____.  | *belt | platform | shelf
questions.feedback: Suitcases arrive on the baggage belt.

questions.text: The agent asks to see the baggage ____.  | *tag | receipt | signal
questions.feedback: You use a baggage tag to identify luggage.

questions.text: The case is described as large and ____.  | *black | heavy | silver
The airline will contact the passenger as soon as ____.  | *possible | tomorrow | check-in
questions.feedback: Common phrase: as soon as possible.

questions.text: This conversation happens at [*an airport|a hotel|a station].
questions.feedback: Baggage belt and baggage tag show the location.

questions.text: The passenger sounds [*calm but worried|angry and rude|happy].

questions.feedback: The agent will track the bag.

questions.text: The problem was noticed after the flight had [*arrived|left|been cancelled].
questions.feedback: The bag did not come out after arrival.
